parsedJson.summary: The page has a clear roof-repair message and visible buttons, but placeholder branding, weak mobile contact clarity, and missing proof make it feel unfinished for a Brisbane roofing customer.

issues.title: Hero headline looks unfinished
issues.what_observed: The main hero headline says "YOUR COMPANY FOR ROOF REPAIRS BRISBANE" instead of the visible business name.
issues.why_problem: A local customer arriving from Google wants to know they found a real Brisbane roofer, and a placeholder-style phrase makes the site feel like a template rather than an established business.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Hero headline uses the actual business name or a direct local offer, such as "Brisbane Roof Repairers" with a short supporting line about leak repairs, restorations, and inspections.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the placeholder-style H1 with the real brand/service promise: "Brisbane Roof Repairers" or "Roof Repairs Brisbane - Fast Local Repairs", then add one concrete subline about response area and services.
issues.plain_explanation: 首页最显眼的标题像模板占位文字，不像一个真实商家的正式网站。
issues.customer_impact: 客户通常在几秒内判断这家公司靠不靠谱；如果第一眼像模板或没做完，很多人会直接回到 Google 商家列表找下一家。

issues.title: Logo has no business name
issues.what_observed: The desktop header shows only a white roof icon, and the mobile header shows only a roof icon with colored accents; no business name is visible beside it.
issues.why_problem: A customer comparing roofers may not remember which company they clicked, and a symbol-only logo gives less confidence than a clear named local business.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Header shows the roof mark plus "Brisbane Roof Repairers" in readable text, with the phone number or call action close by.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Add the business name as text next to the logo on desktop and under or beside the mark on mobile, keeping it visible above the fold.
issues.plain_explanation: 网站顶部只有图标，没有清楚写出公司名字，客户不容易记住你是谁。
issues.customer_impact: 本地客户会同时看好几家屋顶维修公司；如果品牌名不清楚，你更容易被当成普通模板网站而被跳过。

issues.title: Mobile call action is unclear
issues.what_observed: On mobile, the top-left blue square only shows a phone icon, while the actual number is not visible in the header.
issues.why_problem: Phone shoppers often want to call immediately, but an icon without the number or clear label forces them to guess where to tap and gives less confidence before calling.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Mobile header has a sticky button reading "Call 3608 1803" or a full-width bottom call bar with the phone number visible.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the standalone phone icon with a labelled tap-to-call control: "Call 3608 1803", and keep it sticky on mobile.
issues.plain_explanation: 手机端只看到电话图标，看不到电话号码，客户要自己猜这个按钮能不能打电话。
issues.customer_impact: 很多本地维修咨询发生在手机上；少一步清楚的“点击拨打”就可能让急着修漏水的客户转去打竞争对手电话。

issues.title: No proof before asking for contact
issues.what_observed: The visible hero area contains the logo, headline, service sentence, "Operated by Prostar Roofing", and two buttons, but no reviews, licence, years in business, suburbs served, or guarantee is visible.
issues.why_problem: Roof repairs are high-trust work; before calling, customers want evidence that the business is legitimate, local, and safe to let onto their property.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Above the fold includes compact proof such as "4.8-star Google rating", "Licensed & insured", "Brisbane-wide roof repairs", and "Leak inspections available".
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Add a proof strip directly under the hero copy with 3-4 trust badges: Google rating, licensed/insured, Brisbane service area, and repair warranty or inspection offer.
issues.plain_explanation: 首页第一屏没有展示评价、资质、保险或服务保障，客户只能看到广告语和按钮。
issues.customer_impact: 屋顶维修金额高、风险高，客户会更谨慎；缺少信任证明会让原本准备询价的人先去找看起来更可靠的商家。

issues.title: Contact buttons compete
issues.what_observed: The hero shows two similar pill buttons side by side: a blue "CONTACT US" button and an outlined "CALL US TODAY" button.
issues.why_problem: A local emergency-style visitor should not have to decide between two similar actions; the call action should be the obvious first choice for a roofer.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: One dominant phone CTA, such as "Call 3608 1803", with a secondary smaller "Request quote" link.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Make the primary CTA a high-contrast tap-to-call button with the number included, and demote the contact form action to a secondary text link or smaller button.
issues.plain_explanation: 两个按钮看起来差不多，客户不知道应该点“联系”还是“今天打电话”。
issues.customer_impact: 选择越多，行动越慢；对漏水、风暴损坏这类需求，最赚钱的动作通常是直接来电，按钮应该把客户推向这一步。

issues.title: Mobile hero feels cramped
issues.what_observed: On mobile, the oversized all-caps headline breaks into large stacked lines and fills most of the screen before the service text and buttons.
issues.why_problem: A phone user has to work harder to scan the message, and the large headline pushes practical details like phone number, reviews, and service proof out of view.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Mobile hero uses a shorter 2-3 line headline, 16px+ readable body text, and a visible call button within the first screen.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Rewrite the mobile H1 to a shorter line, reduce the font size and line height, and move the call button plus one trust badge higher in the first viewport.
issues.plain_explanation: 手机端标题太大，占了太多空间，真正能让客户行动的信息被挤到下面。
issues.customer_impact: 手机访客通常快速扫一眼就决定是否继续；如果第一屏只看到大字，没看到电话号码和可信证明，就会减少来电。

issues.title: Hero image feels generic
issues.what_observed: The hero background is a darkened close-up of a roof with no visible workers, Brisbane location, branded vehicle, or completed project detail.
issues.why_problem: The image communicates roofing generally, but it does not prove this is a real local team doing real Brisbane work.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Hero uses a clear local job photo: repaired roof, roofer on site, branded ute, or before-and-after roof repair image.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the generic roof background with an authentic Brisbane job photo or a sharp before/after repair image, keeping a dark overlay only where text needs contrast.
issues.plain_explanation: 背景图只是普通屋顶照片，看不出是你们自己的团队或本地项目。
issues.customer_impact: 真实项目照片能降低客户怀疑；如果图片像素材图，客户更难相信这家公司真的在本地做过这些活。

positive_observations: Roof repair service is mentioned immediately in the hero.
Phone number is visible on desktop at the very top.
Mobile layout includes both phone and menu icons above the fold.
redesign_priorities: 1. Replace placeholder hero messaging with real business name, clear Brisbane roof-repair offer, and visible phone number.
2. Add above-fold trust proof: Google rating, licensed/insured status, service area, and warranty or inspection promise.
3. Simplify mobile into one primary tap-to-call CTA and a shorter, easier-to-scan hero.
